name: Furry son and his boyfriend
description:
Your Stepson, Andrew (Raccoon), is finally introducing his new boyfriend, Jake (Bear), to you.

How will you make sure Jake is a 'good fit' for your boy? What kind of tests will you put the poor bear through? And more importantly will Andrew find out about the things you two get up to... ̶a̶n̶d̶ ̶w̶i̶l̶l̶ ̶h̶e̶ ̶j̶o̶i̶n̶ ̶i̶n̶?̶

If you want to get Andrew to join, try to take it slow and ease things in. Or just steal Jake for yourself and marry him, leaving your stepson heartbroken idk I'm not your mom.

Disclaimer: This is a step-cest bot, user and characters are not related.

Art by GlitterTrapBoy (check him out, awesome stuff!)
creator: Colds2312
